requirements.task_name: Submit an RFQ for a stainless steel shaft with tight tolerance and lead time under 15 business days
requirements.task_description: Request a quote for a CNC-turned stainless steel shaft, specifying quantity 250, a tight tolerance option, and selecting the fastest non-expedited lead time that is 15 business days or less.

requirements.task_name: Identify the tightest-tolerance 5-axis aluminum machining service and request sample project information
requirements.task_description: Find a 5-axis CNC machining service for aluminum capable of at least ±0.005 in tolerance, choose the service with the tightest listed tolerance for aluminum, then send a contact form message asking for a sample project using that service.

requirements.task_name: Compare titanium and stainless steel for a medical device part and select the cheaper option under $40 per unit
requirements.task_description: Use the cost estimator to compare titanium and stainless steel for a medical device component at a quantity of 100 units, each requiring fine surface finish, and choose the material whose estimated cost per unit is lower and under $40; then mark that material as the preferred choice for a quote.

requirements.task_name: Find an aerospace case study with delivery under 10 days and start a similar project request
requirements.task_description: Locate a case study in the aerospace industry where delivery time is listed as 10 days or less, open it, and use its call-to-action to initiate a new project request referencing this case study.

requirements.task_name: Build a comparison of three machines that can handle parts ≥ 500 mm with surface finish ≤ Ra 1.6 µm
requirements.task_description: From the equipment list, filter and select three CNC machines that support a maximum part length of at least 500 mm and can achieve a surface finish of Ra 1.6 µm or better, then add them to a comparison view.

requirements.task_name: Schedule a plant tour on a weekday morning next month using the visit form
requirements.task_description: Use the visit scheduling form to request a plant tour on a weekday morning date within the next calendar month, specifying the number of attendees as 3.

requirements.task_name: Create a cart with 2 turning parts and 1 milling part under $150 each from the standard parts catalog
requirements.task_description: From the standard parts catalog, add exactly two CNC turning parts and one CNC milling part to the cart, ensuring each selected part has a unit price less than $150, then proceed to the cart review page.

requirements.task_name: Use the lead-time calculator to choose a shipping option delivering 500 anodized parts within 12 business days
requirements.task_description: Use the online lead-time calculator to estimate production and shipping for 500 machined parts requiring anodizing and inspection, then select a shipping method whose total lead time is 12 business days or less and proceed to the summary page.
